projectDescription: A full-stack library management system with role-based access for members, librarians, and admins, supporting book catalog management, checkouts, and automated email notifications.
keyFeatures: Book catalog management with CRUD operations
Book checkout system with return dates and fines tracking
Automated email notifications for due dates and borrow confirmations
MongoDB data persistence with Mongoose ODM
React + MUI frontend with responsive design
publicApiSurface: POST /signup — Register a new user (member or librarian)
POST /login — Authenticate and receive a JWT token
POST /email — Get current user email and role from token
POST /book/addbook — Add a new book to the catalog
POST /book/getbooks — Get books created by the authenticated librarian
POST /book/getallbooks — Get all books in the catalog
POST /book/updatebook — Update a book by ISBN
POST /book/deletebook — Delete a book by ISBN
POST /book/checkout — Checkout books for a member
POST /api/getDueDate — Send due date reminder email
